name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant. Great for writing, coding, analysis, and deep thinking.

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship chat model. Most widely used AI assistant.

name: Gemini
description: Google's AI assistant. Tight integration with Google Workspace.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered search engine that cites its sources.

name: Meta AI
description: Meta's AI assistant built into WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger.

name: Cursor
description: AI code editor. Tab completion, chat, and full codebase awareness.

name: Windsurf
description: AI code editor by Codeium. Flows and agents for complex tasks.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer built into VS Code and JetBrains.

name: v0
description: Generate UI components from a prompt. Built by Vercel.

name: bolt.new
description: Prompt-to-fullstack app in the browser. Fast prototyping.

name: Replit
description: Browser-based coding with AI that builds and deploys apps.

name: Midjourney
description: Best-in-class image generation. Discord-based, highly stylised output.

name: Flux
description: Open source image model by Black Forest Labs. Photorealistic and fast.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe's AI image generator. Commercially safe, trained on licensed content.

name: ComfyUI
description: Node-based UI for running Stable Diffusion locally. Highly customisable.

name: Kling
description: High quality AI video generation from text or image. Made by Kuaishou.

name: Runway
description: AI video generation and editing. Gen-3 is their flagship model.

name: Pika
description: Text and image to video. Fast generation, good for short clips.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI's video generation model. Cinematic quality output.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Realistic AI voice generation and cloning. Industry standard.

name: Whisper
description: OpenAI's open source speech-to-text model. Runs locally.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI research tool. Upload docs and have a conversation with them.

name: n8n
description: Open source workflow automation. Self-hostable, AI-native nodes.

name: Make
description: Visual automation platform. Connect apps and build AI workflows.

name: Zapier AI
description: Automate tasks between apps with AI-powered zaps.

name: Notion AI
description: AI writing and summarisation built into Notion workspaces.

name: Gamma
description: AI-generated presentations and documents. Prompt to slides in seconds.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting transcription and summarisation. Works with Zoom and Meet.
